title: stachys angustifolia subsp. tenuifolia
intro: Stachys angustifolia subsp. tenuifolia is a subspecies of the Stachys genus, commonly known as the narrow-leaved woundwort or mountain woundwort. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including wound healing, relieving digestive issues, and reducing fever. Stachys angustifolia subsp. tenuifolia is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in folk medicine, although its efficacy and safety may vary depending on the preparation method and individual tolerance.
